description: Schema for extracting key information from an invoice document.

invoice_number.description: The unique identifier for the invoice.

invoice_date.description: The date the invoice was issued, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

due_date.description: The date the invoice payment is due, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vendor_info.description: Information about the vendor or supplier.

name.description: The name of the vendor or supplier.

address.description: The full address of the vendor or supplier.

email.description: The email address of the vendor or supplier.

bill_to_info.description: Information about the customer or recipient of the invoice.

name.description: The name of the customer or recipient.

address.description: The full billing address of the customer or recipient.

line_items.description: An array of individual items or services listed on the invoice.

description.description: A description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unit_price.description: The price per unit of the item or service.

amount.description: The total amount for this line item (quantity * unit_price).

subtotal_amount.description: The sum of all line item amounts before taxes and discounts.

tax_amount.description: The total amount of tax applied to the invoice.

tax_rate.description: The tax rate applied, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 8.875 for 8.875%).

total_amount.description: The grand total amount of the invoice, including subtotal and tax.

payment_terms.description: The payment terms specified on the invoice (e.g., Net 30).
